data.title: AVAX tipped for price recovery as VanEck’s ETF (VAVX) debuts on Nasdaq
data.description:
AVAX has come out of the red zone with over 1% surge after Avalanche posted that VanEck’s AVAX spot ETF, VAVX, will be listed on Nasdaq today. The ETF will stake a portion of its AVAX holdings, distributing rewards to holders after deducting fees. VanEck claims its Avalanche ETF is the first and currently the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/avax-price-vaneck-etf-on-nasdaq/

data.title: VanEck Introduces Avalanche Exchange-Traded Fund
data.description:
The VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX) began trading today, offering investors direct exposure to the price performance of Avalanche’s native token, […] The post VanEck Introduces Avalanche Exchange-Traded Fund appeared first on Coindoo.
source: https://coindoo.com/vaneck-introduces-avalanche-exchange-traded-fund/

data.title: Infrastructure and Regulation Drive Tokenization in Digital Assets
data.description: Jefferies, a prominent Wall Street investment bank, emphasizes the role of infrastructure enhancements and regulatory advancements in promoting tokenization within digital assets. According to NS3.AI, the firm points to an upcoming market structure bill as a pivotal element that may facilitate the next stage of digital asset adoption. This legislation is considered vital for bridging existing gaps and expediting the mainstream integration of tokenized assets.

data.title: Brazil Considers Cryptocurrency Donations for Election Campaigns
data.description: A Brazilian Supreme Federal Court judge is currently reviewing the ban on using cryptocurrencies for election campaign donations ahead of the October general election. According to NS3.AI, this review indicates a growing acceptance of digital assets in the political sphere. Public input is being sought before any rule changes are finalized in March. Experts suggest that global regulatory trends and the rising adoption of cryptocurrencies could lead Brazil to modify its electoral framework to allow cryptocurrency donations while maintaining transparency.

data.title: Senate Crypto Bill Markup Delayed By Snowstorm, But May Still Get Hit With Partisan Vote
data.description:
There’s a good chance snow will be cleared in D. C. by Thursday’s markup—but a “99%” chance the bill won’t receive any Democratic support, one Senate source said.
source: https://decrypt.co/355864/senate-crypto-markup-delayed-snowstorm-partisan-vote

data.title: Wall Street's Jefferies sees market structure bill as tokenization inflection point
data.description:
Wall Street investment firm Jefferies views the recent market structure bill as a significant turning point for the adoption and implementation of tokenization in financial markets, suggesting that this legislation could drive a transformative shift in how assets are represented and traded.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/01/26/wall-street-s-jefferies-sees-market-structure-bill-as-tokenization-inflection-point

data.title: Bitcoin Absorbs Heavy Selling on Binance as Market Structure Holds Firm
data.description:
According to a report shared by CryptoQuant, Bitcoin is currently facing tactical selling pressure on Binance, but without the kind of order-flow imbalance that typically precedes a structural breakdown. Despite elevated sell activity, liquidity conditions suggest the market is absorbing pressure rather than capitulating.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-absorbs-heavy-selling-on-binance-as-market-structure-holds-firm/

data.title: Netherlands’ Bitcoin Taxes Tighten as They Target Unrealized Gains
data.description:
The Netherlands is preparing a significant overhaul of its capital taxation framework. This would introduce taxes on both realized and unrealized gains across cryptocurrencies. A majority of lawmakers are signaling support for the reform, and it’s expected to take effect in 2028
source: https://www.techgaged.com/netherlands-bitcoin-taxes-tighten-as-they-target-unrealized-gains/

data.title: US Bitcoin miners cut output during Winter Storm Fern as network hashrate dips
data.description:
Bitcoin mining output fell across major US firms during Winter Storm Fern as grid pressure prompted power curtailments.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/us-bitcoin-miners-cut-output-during-winter-storm-fern-as-network-hashrate-dips/

data.title: Ethereum founder backtracks on controversial blockchain stance after breakthrough
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, has admitted he was wrong about something he said nearly ten years ago. The blockchain pioneer recently said he’s changed his mind about how users should interact with and check blockchain networks. Buterin caused a stir in 2017 when he referred to the notion of individuals verifying blockchain data on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-founder-backtracks-on-stance/

data.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Corners 3.5% of Ethereum Supply as Treasury Tops With 4.24M ETH Buy
data.description:
BitMine Immersion continues its systematic Ethereum accumulation, adding 40,302 $ETH this week to reach a total of 4,243,338 $ETH (~3. 52% of the circulating supply), with a treasury valued at $12. 3B
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitmine-ethereum-treasury-holdings-update/

data.title: Crypto Funds Shed $1.73B Last Week, Largest Figure Since November

Digital asset investment products saw $1. 73 billion in outflows last week as U. S. -led redemptions intensified.
source: https://decrypt.co/355848/crypto-funds-shed-1-73b-last-week-largest-figure-since-november
